titleStmt.title: SII 17.566: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 566. (A.R. No. 523 of 1904.) TIRUNELLIKKĀVAL, MANNARGUDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Āmalakēśvara temple.

The details of date given viz, year, 8+1 Kumbha śu. 14, Sunday, Pūram correspond to 1225 A.D., February 23, Sunday, ·75, f.d.n. ·30. The Kumbha month seems to have ended that day as the details correspond to the 1st of Mīna. It is also stated in the body of the inscription that the gift was taken over in Paṅgūṉi month.

This epigraph records a gift of 400 kāśus for a lamp for Iraṇavīra sandi for god Tirunellikkāvuḍaiyār in Ārvala-kkūṟṟam in Irājēndra••••-vaḷanāḍu, by Āṇḍavaṉ Śelkalāḻvāṉ of Ārūr. The money was taken over by Śivaṉaṉ Tirunellikkāvuḍaiyāṉ alias Vīraśōḻa Bhaṭṭan, a śivabrāhmaṇa of the temple for executing the wishes of the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirājarājatevarkku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu kumpanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu caturteciyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamai
yum peṟṟa pūrattunāḷ Irācentiracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Ārvalakkūṟṟattu Uṭaiyār tiru nellikkāvuṭaiyār koyil kāṇi Uṭaiya civappirāmmaṇaṉ pāra
ttuvāci civaṉaṉ tirunellikkāvuṭaiyāṉāṉa viracoḻapaṭṭaneṉ Ivvūril Irukkum Ārūr Uṭaiyāṉ Āṇṭavaṉ celkalāḻvāṉukku Upaiyattiṭṭuk kuṭutta paricāvatu Iva
ṉ pakkal Ivvāṇṭaip paṅkūṉi mātattil nāṉ koṇṭa kācu [4 100] Ikkācu nā nūṟuṅ kaikkoṇṭu Ikkācāl vanta policaikkācukku Iraṇaviracantikku Oru tiruviḷakku IṉṉāyanārkaIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.566 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
